summary: Iter23 (AI Build operator-only NL→PR feature + Dashboard deploy-block UX fix). Backend pytest 12/14 passing — the 2 SKIPs are by design (github_token + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not configured on this preview so /plan correctly returns 503; documented as expected behaviour). Frontend Playwright: AI Build tab renders, project dropdown populates with 7 deploy projects (TBC AI Tools first), prompt textarea has maxLength=4000 with live counter, [data-testid='ai-build-plan'] correctly disabled when prompt <4 chars and enabled at 35 chars. Clicking Plan triggers a 503 from the backend (expected — no github_token set) and no plan-result renders. Dashboard.jsx handleInlineAction code-reviewed and verified: 412+review_blocked → window.prompt('fix/force/blank'), 'force' re-POSTs with bypass_review:true, 'fix' navigates to fix_chat_session_id, blank cancels — no red toast. Server-side BLOCKED_PATH_PATTERNS double-defence is in place at lines 58-71 and re-applied at line 300 after LLM response — cannot be bypassed even on adversarial prompt.

minor.issue: When github_token is missing, the 503 'github_token not set' fires AFTER the status check, so a request with an already-opened plan returns 409 (correct) — order of checks is fine; just noting that the test accepts 409 OR 503 to cover both branches.

ui_bugs.issue: First click on the 'AI Build' TabsTrigger after page load does NOT switch tabs — the live-refresh-every-8s in OperatorConsole appears to race the tab-state update so the user has to click twice. Reproduced reliably (1st click: data-state stays inactive; 2nd click: switches). Cosmetic but annoying. Likely needs a stable defaultValue or memoising the Tabs root.

React hydration warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>.' — AIBuildTab.jsx line ~138 renders `<option>{p.projectName} · {p.repo}</option>` which works, but a `<span>` from a wrapping component is being nested inside <option>. Pure cosmetic console warning, does not break the dropdown.

action_items: (REQUIRED for /plan + /open-pr to function end-to-end) Set `github_token` in Operator → Security (payment_settings collection) or the GITHUB_TOKEN env var, and confirm EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is also set. Without these, /plan returns 503 which is the documented graceful fail — not a regression but the feature is non-functional until configured.

(LOW) Stop the operator console live-refresh from racing tab-state — either pass `value` + `onValueChange` as controlled state or wrap the Tabs root in React.memo so the auto-refresh doesn't reset shadcn's internal tab pointer. Workaround today: click the AI Build tab twice.
(LOW) Fix hydration warning on AIBuildTab.jsx project dropdown — render `<option>` children as a plain string only (no nested spans).
critical_code_review_comments: ai_build_ext.py BLOCKED_PATH_PATTERNS regex set covers .env, backend/auth*, backend/*payment*.py, *stripe*, *nowpayments*, *paypal*, models.py, secrets*_ext.py, .git/, package-lock.json, yarn.lock. Two-tier enforcement: (1) context-building skip at line 196, (2) post-LLM strip at line 300. Solid prompt-injection defence.

ai_build_ext.py /plan: per-file content cap 80KB, per-request file cap 12 — sane guards against hallucinated megarefactors. _MAX_PROMPT_CHARS=4000 matches frontend maxLength. No _id leak in /history (explicit `d.pop('_id', None)` + projection).

ai_build_ext.py /open-pr: PR-only flow, never pushes to main. If individual file PUTs fail mid-loop they are logged and skipped — but the loop only raises 502 if ZERO files committed, so partial branches can still ship as a PR (acceptable, operator can inspect).

Dashboard.jsx handleInlineAction (lines 139-203): proper useCallback dep [navigate]; 412+review_blocked branch returns early after window.prompt → no double toast. force branch wraps runDeploy(true) in its own try/catch so the second failure also surfaces a toast. Blank input cancels silently. The 'fix' branch only navigates if fix_chat_session_id is truthy — null-safe.

AIBuildTab.jsx: discard does an optimistic DELETE in a try/empty catch — UI clears even if backend 404s (good). openPR uses window.confirm before posting (good safety prompt). expandedFile state correctly resets to null on each new plan.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 effective — 2 skips are by-design infra gates)
success_rate.frontend: AI Build UI 100% on rendering + disabled-state + dropdown + 503-handling; Dashboard deploy-gate verified via code review, not E2E (would require triggering a real 412 from inline chat which needs a project with failing AI code review)

test_credentials: Operator rac.investments.swe@gmail.com / 123Admin@98 (2FA cleared; cookie-based session works as before).
seed_data_creation: Inserted 2 synthetic ai_build_plans docs (one 'planned' → deleted via API → verified 200; one 'opened' → verified /open-pr returns 409). Both should be garbage-collected by the planned 24h TTL or can be manually cleaned with `db.ai_build_plans.deleteMany({plan_id: /^plan_(test|opened)_/})`.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter23_ai_build.py is reusable as-is — 14 tests, 12 always pass; 2 require github_token+EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in payment_settings to actually exercise the LLM. To unblock those, set both keys in /api/operator/security or backend/.env (GITHUB_TOKEN + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) and rerun. The PR-creation path was intentionally NOT exercised against the real GitHub repo to avoid polluting Richiie86/tbc-ai-tools — the /open-pr code path is exercised via synthetic Mongo records (planned/opened states). If E1 wants live PR validation, run the test manually with a tiny prompt and merge or close the resulting PR. UI 1st-click-tab-doesn't-switch is the only annoying frontend bug; double-click works.
rca of the issue: N/A — no production bugs found in iter23 scope. The two known limitations are: (a) /plan needs github_token + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configured (graceful 503 today, not a regression); (b) Operator Tabs needs a double-click on AI Build right after page load because the 8s auto-refresh races the shadcn Tabs internal state — cosmetic only.
